title: DashboardGetMethod
description: Contract for dashboard.get JSON-RPC method. Query used to populate the Dashboard screen with host status, skill/project summary, install breakdown, and warnings.

DashboardGetRequest.title: DashboardGetRequest
DashboardGetRequest.description: Params for dashboard.get. Empty — no params needed.

DashboardGetActiveHost.title: DashboardGetActiveHost
DashboardGetActiveHost.description: Active Skill Host Folder details, present when an active host is configured

DashboardGetSummary.title: DashboardGetSummary
DashboardGetSummary.description: High-level counts for skills, projects, and warnings

DashboardGetInstallsByMode.title: DashboardGetInstallsByMode
DashboardGetInstallsByMode.description: Count of active installs grouped by install mode

DashboardGetWarningsBySeverity.title: DashboardGetWarningsBySeverity
DashboardGetWarningsBySeverity.description: Count of active warnings grouped by severity level

DashboardGetWarning.title: DashboardGetWarning
DashboardGetWarning.description: A single warning entry surfaced on the dashboard

DashboardGetResponse.title: DashboardGetResponse
DashboardGetResponse.description: Dashboard data snapshot. Errors: database_error (1004) if DB unavailable.

activeHost.description: Populated active host detail, or null when no active host or host row missing

summary.description: High-level counts for skills, projects, and warnings

installsByMode.description: Active installs grouped by install mode

warnings.description: List of active warnings to display on the dashboard
